headline: Healthpeak Properties (DOC) Reaffirms Dividend As Fair Value Stays In Focus
summary: Healthpeak Properties (DOC) recently affirmed a monthly common stock cash dividend of $0.10167 per share for the third quarter of 2026, setting record and payment dates that outline its upcoming income schedule for shareholders. See our latest analysis for Healthpeak Properties. Healthpeak Properties' recent dividend affirmation arrives after a strong run in the stock, with a 30 day share price return of 6.41% and a 90 day share price return of 26.54%.
